title: Variant Armory
description: Adds variants to all weapon tiers that you can use to spice up your armory! Chime and Optifine Support
body:
⚔️ Variant Armory
-
🢂 Adds 13 sword variants and 3 bow variants to spice up your armory. Works on all tiers of sword!

🢂 Just rename weapons to add some flavor to your arsenal!

🢂 Vanilla style

⚠️ Requires Optifine or Chime

HOW TO USE: To get these new weapons, just rename your sword or bow in an anvil and include the name of the weapon you want. For example, to get a diamond spear, just name your diamond sword "spear", "diamond spear", "joe's spear" etc. The naming is not case sensitive.

> ⚔️ Sword variant names: "broadsword", "club", "dagger", "falchion", "flamberge", "hammer", "kama", "pitchfork", "rapier", "scythe", "shortsword", "sickle", "spear"

> 🏹 Bow variant names: "longbow", "recurve", "shortbow"

💡 Info & Help
-
🢂 Ask for help and report bugs in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)
